item.title: House south of Östersund v2.1 1.59 ETS2
item.description:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | May 9, 2026

House south of Östersund v2.1 1.59 ETS2

House south of Östersund. At this house you can rest. Its a very luxerious house with a road leading up to it that also fully made by me. This is a Standalone Scs Addon. Because the house is surrounded by lakes its perfect for pictures!

Compatibility
1.59

Credits: Lars Geveke

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD
item.content:encoded:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | May 9, 2026

House south of Östersund v2.1 1.59 ETS2

House south of Östersund. At this house you can rest. Its a very luxerious house with a road leading up to it that also fully made by me. This is a Standalone Scs Addon. Because the house is surrounded by lakes its perfect for pictures!

Compatibility
1.59

Credits: Lars Geveke

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD

item.title: Iveco Sway engine sound v1.0 1.59 ETS2
item.description:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | May 9, 2026

Iveco Sway engine sound v1.0 1.59 ETS2

This mod adds the realistic engine sound of an Iveco Sway to the game.
Recorded with the help of my friend Alex, it gives a realistic experience with the Iveco Sway.

You have two mods to choose from.
The ONLY difference is the “bip” sound in the interior view when you start the truck that comes with the 2019 version, and the blinker sounds that are different. The rest of the sound is the same: engine, accessories, etc…

Version 1.0 Recorded myself with my Zoom H5 recorder.

This engine sound mod is realistic; it also includes the sounds of the interior truck, like Windows sounds, sticks, blinkers, wipers, switches, horn, air brakes/gears sounds.

It also works in multiplayer (convoys).

Credits: kriechbaum

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD
item.content:encoded:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | May 9, 2026

Iveco Sway engine sound v1.0 1.59 ETS2

This mod adds the realistic engine sound of an Iveco Sway to the game.
Recorded with the help of my friend Alex, it gives a realistic experience with the Iveco Sway.

You have two mods to choose from.
The ONLY difference is the “bip” sound in the interior view when you start the truck that comes with the 2019 version, and the blinker sounds that are different. The rest of the sound is the same: engine, accessories, etc…

Version 1.0 Recorded myself with my Zoom H5 recorder.

This engine sound mod is realistic; it also includes the sounds of the interior truck, like Windows sounds, sticks, blinkers, wipers, switches, horn, air brakes/gears sounds.

It also works in multiplayer (convoys).

Credits: kriechbaum

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD

item.title: Overweight Trailers and Cargo Pack by Jazzycat v11.10.3 ETS2
item.description:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | May 9, 2026

Overweight Trailers and Cargo Pack by Jazzycat v11.10.3 ETS2

Pack adds in game 53 new models of overweight and flatbed trailers (different trailers by Fliegl, Wielton, Kassbohrer, Krone, Goldhofer, Nooteboom, HRD, Estepe, Langendorf, Galtrailer, Chmzap, Maz, Nefaz and others), 341 new cargo, 110 traffic trailers.
New cargo added to companies for all popular maps.
All standalone.
Works on any maps.
For version 1.59.x
Compatible with all my packs, except trailers and cargo pack.
Included english and russian localization.
If you want overweight trailers in traffic put in mod folder file:
overweight_trailers_and_cargo_pack_by_Jazzycat_traf.scs

Attention! This pack is part of my Trailers and cargo pack. Don’t use them together!

Version 11.10.3 – compatibility update for patch 1.59.x

Credits: Jazzycat

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD
item.content:encoded:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | May 9, 2026

Overweight Trailers and Cargo Pack by Jazzycat v11.10.3 ETS2

Pack adds in game 53 new models of overweight and flatbed trailers (different trailers by Fliegl, Wielton, Kassbohrer, Krone, Goldhofer, Nooteboom, HRD, Estepe, Langendorf, Galtrailer, Chmzap, Maz, Nefaz and others), 341 new cargo, 110 traffic trailers.
New cargo added to companies for all popular maps.
All standalone.
Works on any maps.
For version 1.59.x
Compatible with all my packs, except trailers and cargo pack.
Included english and russian localization.
If you want overweight trailers in traffic put in mod folder file:
overweight_trailers_and_cargo_pack_by_Jazzycat_traf.scs

Attention! This pack is part of my Trailers and cargo pack. Don’t use them together!

Version 11.10.3 – compatibility update for patch 1.59.x

Credits: Jazzycat

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD

item.title: Motorcycle Traffic Pack by Jazzycat v6.5.16 ETS2
item.description:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | May 9, 2026

Motorcycle Traffic Pack by Jazzycat v6.5.16 ETS2

Pack adds in traffic 95 motorcycles:
BMW S1000RR(’09, ’15), K1200S, HP2
Honda CB600 Hornet, CB500, CBR250R, CBR1000RR, Shadow RS, CB750F, XR125, CBR650R, PCX, Gold Wing GL, Shadow Phantom, CMX500 Rebel, Interstate, Monkey 125, Forza 300, CRF1000L Africa Twin, RF250L Rally
Ducati 999, 1199, Monster 1200, XDiavel, Supersport, Multistrada, 848 Evo, Monster S4, Desmosedici RR, 1000SS, 1098, Diavel, Scrambler, Monster S4, Hypermotard
Kawasaki Ninja 300, ZX-10R, ZX-12R, ZX-14R, Z800, 1400GTR, VN2000 Vulcan, Z750, Z1000, VN900 Vulcan, KLX250
Triumph Speed Triple, Bonneville
Aprilia Tuono V4, RSV4, Dorsoduro
KTM 1290 Super Duke GT, 1190 RC8, 690 Duke, 1290 Super Adventure, 790 Duke, 690 SMC R
Husqvarna 701 Supermoto, Vitpilen 701
MBK Nitro
MV Agusta Brutale, F4
MZ Mastiff
Suzuki Hayabusa, GSX-R750, Boulevard M109R, RG250 Gamma
Yamaha MT-10, YZF-R6, YZF-R1, YFZ-R3, Midnight Star, VMax, XMax, Vino, XJ6, XT660, FZ8
Benelli Tornado Naked Tre R160
Lauge Jensen Viking
Piaggio Vespa 946
Lightning LS218
Indian Chieftain
Harley Davidson Fat Boy Lo, FXSTC Softail Custom, Heritage Classic, Road Glide, FXSTB Softail Night Train, Iron 883, Night Rod Special

All standalone, works on any maps.
Compatible with all my packs.
For version 1.59.x
Included two versions: for use only with default traffic and for use with my AI pack.
You must have in mod folder two files:
motorcycle_traffic_pack_by_Jazzycat.scs
and
motorcycle_traffic_pack_by_Jazzycat_def.scs (only with default traffic)
or
motorcycle_traffic_pack_by_Jazzycat_jaz.scs (with my AI pack)

Version 6.5.16 – compatibility update for patch 1.59.x

Credits: Jazzycat

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD

Kawasaki Ninja 300, ZX-10R, ZX-12R, ZX-14R, Z800, 1400GTR, VN2000 Vulcan, Z750, Z1000, VN900 Vulcan, KLX250

Husqvarna 701 Supermoto, Vitpilen 701
MBK Nitro
MV Agusta Brutale, F4
MZ Mastiff
Suzuki Hayabusa, GSX-R750, Boulevard M109R, RG250 Gamma
Yamaha MT-10, YZF-R6, YZF-R1, YFZ-R3, Midnight Star, VMax, XMax, Vino, XJ6, XT660, FZ8
Benelli Tornado Naked Tre R160
Lauge Jensen Viking
Piaggio Vespa 946
Lightning LS218
Indian Chieftain
Harley Davidson Fat Boy Lo, FXSTC Softail Custom, Heritage Classic, Road Glide, FXSTB Softail Night Train, Iron 883, Night Rod Special

All standalone, works on any maps.
Compatible with all my packs.
For version 1.59.x
Included two versions: for use only with default traffic and for use with my AI pack.
You must have in mod folder two files:
motorcycle_traffic_pack_by_Jazzycat.scs
and
motorcycle_traffic_pack_by_Jazzycat_def.scs (only with default traffic)
or
motorcycle_traffic_pack_by_Jazzycat_jaz.scs (with my AI pack)

Version 6.5.16 – compatibility update for patch 1.59.x

Credits: Jazzycat

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD

item.title: Oberhavel Map v1.7.3 1.59 ETS2
item.description:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | May 9, 2026

Oberhavel Map v1.7.3 1.59 ETS2

Changelog ETS 1.59 – 1.7.3
Update 1.59

Oberhavel is a district in the north of Berlin. The map mod includes two towns:
Velten has four businesses, two gas stations, a garage, and a workshop with its own house.
Germendorf in the industrial area with two businesses and a workshop.

Doesn’t work with the construction mod / Baustellen Mod
This version is not ProMods compatible

Credits: Kimble

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD
item.content:encoded:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | May 9, 2026

Oberhavel Map v1.7.3 1.59 ETS2

Changelog ETS 1.59 – 1.7.3
Update 1.59

Oberhavel is a district in the north of Berlin. The map mod includes two towns:
Velten has four businesses, two gas stations, a garage, and a workshop with its own house.
Germendorf in the industrial area with two businesses and a workshop.

Doesn’t work with the construction mod / Baustellen Mod
This version is not ProMods compatible

Credits: Kimble

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.
